Expect scalping opportunities within this tight range with a gravitational bias towards the 26500-26510 Max Pain cluster.

Monumental Call OI in the MONTHLY expiration, creating a strong gravitational pull and friction point below the current spot price.

0DTE Max Pain aligning perfectly with WEEKLY Max Pain and the Put Resonance zone, acting as the ultimate directional target for market makers.
Largest single-expiry Put OI providing absolute downside protection and a definitive dealer hedging floor.
Immediate ATM resistance with very high 0DTE volume and WEEKLY OI, pinning the spot price and causing local friction.
